[Helper] Renew/reactivate Workspace Events subscriptions

Usage: gws +renew [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --name <NAME>          Subscription name to reactivate (e.g., subscriptions/SUB_ID)
      --sanitize <TEMPLATE>  Sanitize API responses through a Model Armor template. Requires cloud-platform scope. Format: projects/PROJECT/locations/LOCATION/templates/TEMPLATE. Also reads GWS_SANITIZE_TEMPLATE env var.
      --all                  Renew all subscriptions expiring within --within window
      --dry-run              Validate the request locally without sending it to the API
      --format <FORMAT>      Output format: json (default), table, yaml, csv
      --within <DURATION>    Time window for --all (e.g., 1h, 30m, 2d) [default: 1h]
  -h, --help                 Print help

EXAMPLES:
  gws events +renew --name subscriptions/SUB_ID
  gws events +renew --all --within 2d

TIPS:
  Subscriptions expire if not renewed periodically.
  Use --all with a cron job to keep subscriptions alive.
